summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WinDesk Market SaaS application. All 20 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend testing verified all major pages and flows work correctly including landing page, login, dashboard, workspaces, market, sessions, settings, and logout.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - API root returns version info
POST /api/auth/login - Admin login (admin@windesk.cloud) returns access_token
POST /api/auth/login - Demo user login (usuario1@windesk.cloud) returns access_token
POST /api/auth/login - Invalid credentials returns 401
GET /api/auth/me - Without token returns 401
GET /api/auth/me - With valid token returns user info
GET /api/stats - Returns stats object with active_sessions, total_workspaces, total_users
GET /api/workspaces - Returns workspace list (6 workspaces)
GET /api/applications - Returns applications list
GET /api/sessions - Returns sessions list
GET /api/sessions/active - Returns active sessions
GET /api/audit-logs - Returns audit log list
GET /api/organizations - Returns organizations list
GET /api/policies - Returns policies list
GET /api/market/addons - Returns addon list (10 addons)
POST /api/market/price - Returns price calculation
POST /api/market/price - Price with addons works correctly
GET /api/market/my-vms - Returns user's VMs
GET /api/market/orders - Returns user's orders
POST /api/auth/logout - Logout works and invalidates token
Landing page loads with hero, CTA buttons (Try Live Demo, View Pricing, Windows VDI Cloud)
Landing page has navigation (Demo, Pricing, Features, Sign In, Start Free Trial)
Login page renders with email/password fields and Zitadel SSO button
Login with admin@windesk.cloud / Admin123! redirects to /dashboard
Login with usuario1@windesk.cloud / Demo123! redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard shows KPIs (Workspaces, Sessions, Users, Uptime), Quick Actions, Active Sessions section
Sidebar navigation includes all required items with Windows VDI Market highlighted as NEW
Market page /market shows 3 plans (Starter $50, Business $100, Enterprise $200) with monthly/annual toggle
Workspaces page /workspaces loads with '+ Comprar VM Windows' button and 6 workspace cards
Sessions page /sessions loads correctly
Settings page /settings shows profile, auth method (Email/Password, MFA), language toggle (Español/English)
Logout button in sidebar works and redirects to landing page
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Auth context properly handles Bearer token authentication
Protected routes correctly redirect unauthenticated users to login
Language context provides proper i18n support (Spanish/English)
seed_data_creation: Admin and demo users are seeded on backend startup via seed_data() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend pages load and integrate properly with backend. Market page has 3-step flow (plan selection -> configurator -> checkout). VM provisioning is MOCKED (12-step SSE simulation). Payments are in demo mode. JumpServer integration returns mock URLs.

mocked_apis.JumpServer connection: Returns mock Luna URLs when JumpServer not configured
